subject: do not be sexy (boring is better)
body:
Hey Justin - Liam here.

Since AI feels so new and disruptive, it is easy to assume everything has changed.

But when it comes to actually making money with AI, the truth is almost stupidly simple:

Pick one real business problem...

Build a system that solves it reliably.

That is it.

Your dentist website looks like it is stuck in 2005?

Fix it with AI in minutes.

Sell them the upgrade.

Client wants more sales calls?

Install an automated booking system.

Charge for the outcome.

Notice what you are not selling?

AI.

You are selling results.

Is it sexy? No.

Is it stable? Absolutely.

Every way to get rich with AI in 2026 looks the same:

AI is the toolset.

Rapid execution is the edge.

The fundamentals have not changed.

Boring, reliable outcomes win. Every time.

Keep going,

Liam
